diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
index b018511..a074e0a 100644
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -101,6 +101,8 @@ export PID_AGENT_LLM_API_KEY="optional-api-key"
 
 旧的 `AGENTCAD_LLM_*` 环境变量仍可使用，但新部署应使用 `PID_AGENT_*`。
 
+Kimi Code 使用 OpenAI-compatible 地址 `https://api.kimi.com/coding/v1`，模型名可选 `k3`、`kimi-for-coding` 或 `kimi-for-coding-highspeed`。P&ID-Agent 会为这些模型自动发送其要求的 `temperature=1`。
+
 规划流程：
 
 1. 后端读取最新文档、revision 和语义场景摘要；

 from .service import DocumentService
 from .symbols import SymbolRegistry

             ],
-            "temperature": 0.1,
+            "temperature": completion_temperature(provider, 0.1),
             "response_format": {"type": "json_object"},
         }
         headers = self._headers(provider)

@@ -275,8 +276,18 @@ class OpenAICompatiblePlanner:
                 provider_status=response.status_code,
             )
         if response.is_error:
+            body = response.text[:1000]
+            if response.status_code == 400 and "invalid temperature" in body.lower():
+                raise LLMResponseError(
+                    "模型拒绝了 temperature 参数。Kimi Coding 模型要求 temperature=1；"
+                    "请使用 OpenAI 兼容 Base URL https://api.kimi.com/coding/v1，"
+                    "并选择 k3、kimi-for-coding 或 kimi-for-coding-highspeed。"
+                    f" Provider response: {body}",
+                    provider=provider,
+                    provider_status=response.status_code,
+                )
             raise LLMResponseError(
-                f"model provider returned HTTP {response.status_code}: {response.text[:1000]}",
+                f"model provider returned HTTP {response.status_code}: {body}",
                 provider=provider,
                 provider_status=response.status_code,
